meaning: n.撒哈拉沙漠(非洲北部大沙漠),荒野
examples: The Sahara slowly became drier and lakes vanished.
The Sahara is a sandy desert with great sand hills.
Even before the drought, the Sahara was never well watered.
In 1976, in the Western Sahara, the Polisario Front proclaimed the Saharan Arab Democratic Republic.
One area of concern is the Sahel, a vast semi-arid area south of the Sahara desert.
